# This file is automatically generated from cmake.toml - DO NOT EDIT
# See https://github.com/build-cpp/cmkr for more information

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.19)

if(CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR STREQUAL CMAKE_BINARY_DIR)
	message(FATAL_ERROR "In-tree builds are not supported. Run CMake from a separate directory: cmake -B build")
endif()

set(CMKR_ROOT_PROJECT OFF)
if(CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR STREQUAL CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR)
	set(CMKR_ROOT_PROJECT ON)

	# Bootstrap cmkr and automatically regenerate CMakeLists.txt
	include("../../../cmake/cmkr.cmake" OPTIONAL RESULT_VARIABLE CMKR_INCLUDE_RESULT)
	if(CMKR_INCLUDE_RESULT)
		cmkr()
	endif()

	# Enable folder support
	set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY USE_FOLDERS ON)

	# Create a configure-time dependency on cmake.toml to improve IDE support
	set_property(DIRECTORY APPEND PROPERTY CMAKE_CONFIGURE_DEPENDS cmake.toml)
endif()

# Options
option(ELFBUG_BUILD_TESTS "" OFF)

project(x64dbg-linux
	LANGUAGES
		C
		CXX
)

# Packages
find_package(Threads REQUIRED)

# Target: x64dbg-linux
if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux") # linux
	set(x64dbg-linux_SOURCES
		cmake.toml
		"core/DbgAdapter.cpp"
		"core/DbgAdapter.h"
		"core/LinuxArchitecture.h"
		"gui/CPUStack.cpp"
		"gui/CPUStack.h"
		"gui/MainWindow.cpp"
		"gui/MainWindow.h"
		"main/main.cpp"
		"resources/icons.qrc"
	)

	add_executable(x64dbg-linux)

	target_sources(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE ${x64dbg-linux_SOURCES})
	source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${x64dbg-linux_SOURCES})

	target_compile_features(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE
		cxx_std_20
	)

	target_include_directories(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE
		.
	)

	target_link_libraries(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE
		Threads::Threads
	)

	get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
		set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT x64dbg-linux)
	endif()

	set(CMKR_TARGET x64dbg-linux)
	# Add ElfBug sources directly (avoiding source_group issue with parent dir files)
	set(ELFBUG_SOURCES
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/api/elfbug_api.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/core/Debugger.Loop.Process.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/core/Debugger.Loop.Signal.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/core/Debugger.Loop.Thread.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/core/Debugger.Loop.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/core/Debugger.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/process/Breakpoint.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/process/Memory.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/process/Process.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/process/ProcessArch.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/thread/HardwareBreakpoint.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/thread/Registers.cpp"
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug/ElfBug/thread/Thread.cpp"
	)
	
target_sources(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE ${ELFBUG_SOURCES})
	
target_include_directories(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE
	    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../ElfBug"
	)
	
# Find Qt5 and include widgets
	find_package(Qt5 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Core Widgets Gui Svg WebSockets)
	include("${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../widgets/Qt.cmake")
	add_subdirectory("${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../widgets" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/widgets")
	
# Link Qt and widgets
	target_link_libraries(x64dbg-linux PRIVATE
	    Qt5::Core
	    Qt5::Widgets
	    Qt5::Gui
	    Qt5::Svg
	    Qt5::WebSockets
	    x64dbg::widgets
	)
	
# Set Qt properties
	set_target_properties(x64dbg-linux PROPERTIES
	    AUTOMOC ON
	    AUTORCC ON
	    AUTOUIC ON
	)

endif()
